title: Episode 3 — Musk vs OpenAI (Gemini voice)
description: A three-way deliberation on Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI's for-profit conversion: legitimate grievance about a betrayed founding mission, or competitor using the courts to hobble a rival? Voice: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS.
summary: A three-way deliberation on Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI's for-profit conversion: legitimate grievance about a betrayed founding mission, or competitor using the courts to hobble a rival? Voice: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS.
